title: [SCF to Calyx] Generates external memory outside top level component

features.name: local memref alloc in non-top-level func
features.description: Code should include a memref.alloc operation inside a non-top-level func.func that is called from the entry point

features.name: external memory in non-top-level calyx component
features.description: Code should include a non-top-level calyx.component containing a calyx.seq_mem with the {external = true} attribute

features.name: scf for loop with memref store to local alloc
features.description: Code should include an scf.for loop that performs a memref.store into a locally allocated memref

features.name: mlir function with memref alloc and inter-function call
features.description: Code should include a func.func that allocates a local memref and is called from another function with a memref argument

features.name: local memory without external or ref in calyx component
features.description: Code should include a calyx.seq_mem inside a non-top-level calyx.component that lacks both external and ref attributes

features.name: top-level component with external memory
features.description: Code should include a calyx.component marked with a toplevel attribute containing a calyx.seq_mem with the {external = true} attribute
